text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we're discussing strategies for the next
scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What?! No way! I wanna fly at top speed!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Don't you want to see me blow past the
competition at Mach 10?
choice_data_list: You need to be a late surger this time—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
No way! If you're gonna go that far, then you
need to get me in the mood!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If you show me a good time, I'll listen to what you
have to say!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Why is this so challenging?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's a bit moody, so it'll probably be for the best
if I just go with the flow and try to make her
happy.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Okay! ♪ What kind of fight?
choice_data_list: A staring contest. First one to look away loses!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Why something so simple? ...Whatever, let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer... Don't look at me like that...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Nooo! I can't stand it!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
W-wait! I want a rematch! I'll definitely win this
time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun and I keep up this game for a
while and have a surprising amount of fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ultimately, she promises to follow my strategy
when she runs in the scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, it doesn't take long before she starts
getting bored of the meeting.
choice_data_list: How about we take a break?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We go for a walk around campus.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ Out on a stroll with Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's like we're on a date! Just the two of us walking
together!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Don't you think so? ♪
choice_data_list: As long as you're having fun.
As long as you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her enthusiasm renewed, Mayano Top Gun
promises to follow my strategy when she runs in
the scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If I could just get her to have fun and understand the importance of strategy...
choice_data_list: Should we relax a bit and watch a video?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Totally!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What should we watch? Maybe a romantic
comedy? Ooh, I can't wait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, what is this?
choice_data_list: The Fundamentals and Essence of Racing Strategy.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You said we were going to relax! How is more
studying relaxing?!
choice_data_list:
I thought you'd understand better if we
reviewed the basics.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're a meanie, Trainer! You can't play with a
girl's feelings like this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly angry, Mayano Top Gun storms out.
